validation_method: Random 80/20 row split (same cities, different years can appear in both train and test)

city_holdout.method: Entire cities held out of training (true unseen-city generalization test)
city_holdout.note: R2 drops sharply here because elevation is near-constant per city, so the random-split model partly memorizes each city via elevation rather than learning a relationship that transfers to a city it has never seen.

source.title: Time-series dataset on land surface temperature, vegetation, built up areas and other climatic factors in top 20 global cities (2000–2018)

disclosure: Model trained on MODIS-derived satellite data from 20 global megacities (2000-2018), Data in Brief, Elsevier — DOI: 10.1016/j.dib.2019.103803. Predicts general LST-vegetation-urbanization relationships; not India-specific training data.
